sql.loan_count_by_status_cohort: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date)::int AS approval_cohort_year, CASE l.status WHEN 'A' THEN 'finished OK' WHEN 'B' THEN 'finished default' WHEN 'C' THEN 'running OK' WHEN 'D' THEN 'running in debt' END AS status_label, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS loan_count FROM loan l GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.avg_amount_by_duration_status: SELECT l.duration AS duration_months, CASE l.status WHEN 'A' THEN 'finished OK' WHEN 'B' THEN 'finished default' WHEN 'C' THEN 'running OK' WHEN 'D' THEN 'running in debt' END AS status_label, AVG(l.amount) AS avg_loan_amount FROM loan l GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.total_approved_amount_1998: SELECT SUM(l.amount) AS total_approved_amount_1998 FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1998-01-01' AND l.date < DATE '1999-01-01';

chart_spec.layout_intent: aging dashboard with status/cohort bar, duration matrix, and KPI
